criteria_results.criterion: Tests clearly prove the target weak workflow prompts are caught.
criteria_results.evidence: The weak workflow fixture triggers PL084 and the assertion checks that the violation message mentions unresolved placeholder text plus missing workflow contract elements.

criteria_results.criterion: Tests cover at least one clean prompt that should not trigger the new rule.
criteria_results.evidence: The clean workflow fixture passes, and two non-workflow guardrail cases verify that ordinary TODO prose and lightweight task text do not spuriously trigger PL084.

criteria_results.criterion: Keep changes scoped to tests and fixtures.
criteria_results.evidence: The slice only changed tests/rules/test_gates.py and two fixture files under tests/fixtures.

optional_improvements: Add one or two more real-world fixtures from external orchestration repos if PL084 coverage expands beyond this pilot.
judge_summary: T002 stayed inside its lane and gives PL084 the minimum evidence needed for a controlled pilot. The first red test was resolved within the task and the final coverage is narrow but credible.
